column1: #   Integrated Database of Hanzi Dictionaries in Early Japan
#   KTB: Kosanjibon Tenrei Bansho Meigi database -- Full text version
#   Kosanjibon Tenrei bansho meigi 篆隸萬象名義, Kosanji copy 高山寺本.
#   Buddhist monk Kukai of the Heian period 空海, c. 827-835.
#   Copyright (c) 2016-2026 HDIC project, IKEDA Shoju (Chair, Professor Emeritus, Hokkaido University)
#   LI Yuan (Person in charge of text data proofreading)
#   LIU Guanwei (Person in charge of image database design and implementation)
#   Research group of Linguistics, Hokkaido University Faculty of Humanities and Human Siences
#   North 10, West 7, Kita-ku Sapporo, Hokkaido, 060-0810 Japan
#   Data License Information and Access Rights
#   Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International License (CC BY-SA 4.0)
#   TBID (v_www_xyz)          Book(v), leaf(www), recto-verso(x), line(y) and number(z)
#   Entry_type                For details, refer to the following section
#   Entry_diff                Differences of transliteration with other scholars
#   TB_def                    Definition of pronunciation, meaning and variant(s)
#   SYID (vwwwxyyz)           Book(v), leaf(www), recto-verso(x), line(yy) and number(z)
#   YYID (Ywwxxxyyy-z)        Volume(ww), leaf(xxx), line(yyy) and number(z)
#   Lv_page                   Zhuan li wan xiang ming yi jiao shi 篆隸萬象名義校釋
#   Zang_page                 Zhong gu Han zi liu bian 中古漢字流變
#   2 Regular_seal            隸書掲出字 篆書併存
#   3 Embedded_clerical       埋字 隸書字體
#   5 Embedded_seal           埋字 篆書字體
#   6 Omitted                 脫字 項目全體 脫落
#   7 Omitted_regular         脫字 隸書掲出字 脫落
#   Group d -- Variant of the Songben Yupian
#   8 Songben-Yupian          宋本《玉篇》增補之異體字
#                            《說文解字》、《玉篇》殘卷・佚文、《新撰字鏡》玉篇引用部分等，本文存
#   TB: Tenrei Bansho Meigi 篆隸萬象名義, Kosanji copy 高山寺本
#   YY: Yuanben Yupian 原本玉篇, fragments of vol.8, 9, 18, 19, 22, 24 and 27
#   SY: Songben Yupian 宋本玉篇, Zecuntang edition 澤存堂本

#   Shirafuji Noriyuki 白藤禮幸, An Index of Headwords in the Tenrei Bansho Meigi 掲出字索引, Materials from Ancient Glossaries in the Kosanji Temple Collection 1 高山寺古辭書資料第一, Tokyo: Uiversity of Tokyo Press 東京大学出版会, 1977.

#   Miyazawa Toshimasa 宮澤俊雅, A List of Headwords with Notes in the Tenrei Bansho Meigi 掲出字一覽表, Materials from Ancient Glossaries in the Kosanji Temple Collection 1 高山寺古辭書資料第一, Tokyo: University of Tokyo Press 東京大学出版会, 1977.
#   Ueda Tadashi 上田正, A Complete List of Fanqie in the Original Yupian 玉篇反切總覽, Kobe: Private edition, 1986.
#   Lv Hao 呂浩, Zhuan li wan xiang ming yi jiao shi: A Transliteration and Text-critical Notes 篆隸萬象名義校釋, Shanghai: Xuelin Press 學林出版社, 2007.
#   Zang Kehe 臧克和, Zhong gu Han zi liu bian 中古漢字流變, Shanghai : Hua dong shi fan da xue chu ban she 華東師範大學出版社, 2008.
#   Li Yuan 李媛, Embedded and Omitted Headword: Issues Regarding Entry Counts in Tenrei-Bansho-Meigi 埋字と脫字―篆隸象名義の掲出字數をめぐる問題―, Kuntengo to Kunten-Shiryo 訓點語と訓點資料 135: 60-78, 2015.
#   We are grateful to Kosanji Temple authorities Ogawa Chie (the previous chief priest) and Ishizuka Harumichi (the representative director) for permission to publish the decipherment text of KTB.
#   This work was supported by JSPS KAKENHI Grant Number 25370506, 16H03422, 23K17500, 25K00466 and 26K21717.

column7: 於逸反。少也，初也，同也。〔弌：古文。〕
泰堅反。顛也，顯也，君也。〔𠀡：古文。〕〔𠀘：古文。〕〔兲：古文。〕〔𠕹：古文。〕
魚園反。大也，始也，首也，長也。〔元(seal)：古文。〕
理致反。使也，君所使也。〔吏(seal)：古文。〕三吏，三公也。

column10: 埋字B。篆書字形。吏(seal)：呂作⿱⿱山一⿱口又。
